name: recomby-geo
description: GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) workflow for OpenAI Codex CLI. The vendored capability skills (audit, content writing, schema, internal linking, keyword expansion, quality scoring, frontend design) plus the original geo-review-html renderer are loaded from ./skills/. The geo-pipeline skill is the Codex entry point: it orchestrates the 7-stage pipeline (intake → audit → gap → content-brief → production → distribution → reaudit) that Claude Code drives via /01-intake … /07-reaudit slash commands. Per-client folder convention; the stage specs live in commands/ and orchestrator/run.md (shared single source of truth).
author: Recomby.ai
